message:
test(search): add FrankenSearch integration test suite and benchmarks (ft-dr6zv.1.7)

31 integration tests covering the full search stack: RRF fusion correctness,
two-tier blending, Kendall Tau correlation, content-hash dedup, TTL expiry,
size-limit eviction, rate limiting, pipeline watermarks, state transitions,
concurrent safety, and serde roundtrips. Criterion benchmarks for RRF fusion,
blending, Kendall Tau, indexing throughput, and dedup overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -332,6 +332,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "semantic_anomaly_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "frankensearch_bench"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
